description: Style NoteWork the summer's high octane fashion trends with cobblerz's handmade leatherette sandals. This pair is just the right investment for a wardrobe update. Polish your look with this pair - these provide the perfect grounding for the season's brights. Heel: 5"Product DetailsBeige, green and red forefoot straps with bucklingHeel collar with a buckled ankle loop looping through itSoft footbed with brand badge on the heelThick midsole at the forefoot region and the heel are covered with a velvetty fabricTPU outsole with a plastic heel patchMaterial and CareLeatheretteUse a leather brush and conditioner to clean this product
